import requests
import json
import sys

try:
    response = requests.post\(
        ''http://localhost:8080/api/mcp/notes'',
        json={''title'': ''Final MCP Test'', ''content'': ''Created via ChatGPT''},
        timeout=10
    \)
    print\(f''Status: {response.status_code}''\)
    print\(f''Response body: {response.text}''\)
    print\(f''Response headers: {dict\(response.headers\)}''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Exception: {e}'', file=sys.stderr\)
")

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import requests

response = requests.post\(
    ''http://localhost:8080/api/mcp/notes/create'',
    params={''title'': ''ChatGPT MCP Success'', ''content'': ''Created via ChatGPT!''},
    timeout=10
\)
print\(f''Status: {response.status_code}''\)
print\(f''Response: {response.text}''\)
if response.status_code == 201 or response.status_code == 200:
    print\(''SUCCESS: Note created via MCP!''\)
    import json
    data = response.json\(\)
    print\(f''Note ID: {data.get\(""id""\)}''\)
")

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
# Find lines 162-250 and comment them out
with open\(''C:/Users/bryan/Seedream/backend/app/routers/mcp_write.py'', ''r''\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Find and comment out the duplicate endpoint
result = []
skip_until_next_endpoint = False
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if ''# Keep the original endpoint for now'' in line:
        skip_until_next_endpoint = True
    if skip_until_next_endpoint:
        if line.strip\(\).startswith\(''@router.''\) and ''mcp_create_note'' not in line:
            skip_until_next_endpoint = False
            result.append\(line\)
        else:
            result.append\(''# '' + line if line.strip\(\) and not line.strip\(\).startswith\(''#''\) else line\)
    else:
        result.append\(line\)

with open\(''C:/Users/bryan/Seedream/backend/app/routers/mcp_write.py'', ''w''\) as f:
    f.writelines\(result\)

print\(''Commented out duplicate endpoint''\)
")
